title: Team Building for Beginners
introduction: A balanced team normally combines heroes that absorb damage, heroes that deal damage and heroes that provide support, buffs, debuffs or crowd control.
The exact composition should change according to your available heroes, the enemy team and the game mode.

roles.title: Tanks
roles.description: Tanks receive most of the incoming damage and protect the rest of the team.

roles.title: Damage dealers
roles.description: DPS heroes provide the team’s primary damage.

roles.title: Supports, buffers and debuffers
roles.description: These heroes strengthen allies, weaken enemies, remove control effects or provide other utility.

placementAdvice.title: Place most tanks in front
placementAdvice.description: Many early-game DPS heroes target the front row, so tanks normally belong there.

placementAdvice.title: Check position-specific skills
placementAdvice.description: Some tanks and other heroes need position 1 for their abilities or recommended build to work correctly.

placementAdvice.title: Protect most DPS heroes
placementAdvice.description: Most damage dealers should stay in the back unless their skills rely on counterattacks or another special mechanic.

placementAdvice.title: Consider health-triggered abilities
placementAdvice.description: Heroes whose abilities activate after losing health may benefit from positions where they receive controlled damage.

placementAdvice.title: Read each hero’s skills
placementAdvice.description: Role labels alone are not enough. Placement and team composition should follow the actual hero skills.

compositionNotes: Faction combinations can provide additional team bonuses.
Faction bonuses from Star Tech are added to normal faction-composition bonuses.
The original guide considers Star Tech faction-bonus upgrades generally low priority.
Some heroes provide additional bonuses specifically to allies from their own faction.
disclaimer: The suggested numbers are a starting point rather than a fixed rule. Adjust the team for the enemy, game mode and heroes available to you.
